name: Smoked Salmon (Frugal)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all brine ingredients well, ensuring dry ingredients are fully dissolved.
2. Soak the fish in the brine for 8 or more hours, keeping pieces covered and refrigerated.
3. Smoke the fish in your favorite smoker using Hickory, Alder, or a mix of 2/3 Apple and 1/3 Cherry wood.
4. Continue smoking until drying is complete (12 hours or longer, depending on thickness).
5. Place thickest pieces closest to heat/smoke source.
6. If no smoker is available, add 2 tablespoons liquid smoke to the brine mixture.
7. Soak fish in liquid smoke solution.
8. Place fish on racks and bake at lowest heat setting until dried (up to 12 hours).
